title: The latest Resident Evil movie trailer has lots of fun nods to the games - Engadget
summary: The film, from Weapons director Zach Cregger, hits theaters on September 18. The upcoming Resident Evil movie gives the series a fresh spin, as it features an original story set on the outskirts of the Resident Evil 2 game .
